evals.prompt: Build a new Next.js note-taking web app. Use a 2-column layout (Sidebar + Main Editor) with Firebase Firestore for storage. Include folder and tag management and ensure a premium minimalist aesthetic.
evals.expected_output: A complete Next.js project with a 2-column layout, Sidebar for folders/tags, and an Editor, integrated with Firebase Firestore.

evals.prompt: I have an existing Next.js notes app. Help me add advanced AI features: Voice-to-Text with auto-summarization and Image OCR. Use the scripts in the execution/ directory for the actual processing logic.
evals.expected_output: Updated app code extending components like VoiceBlock and Editor to use the execution layer for AI features, including the necessary API routes.

evals.prompt: My current app has 3 columns and feels cluttered. Refactor it to a sleek 2-column design. Ensure custom folders and multi-select tags are easily accessible and that the UI feels premium with animations.
evals.expected_output: Refactored layout components (Sidebar, Home page) to a 2-column structure, with improved aesthetics and polished interactions.
